title: BISING: Noise and Experimental Music in Indonesia
original_title: Bising: Noise & Experimental Music in Indonesia
overview: Indonesian noise, the largest scene of extreme and independent music scene is the biggest in South-East Asia. This documentary gives an extensive overview with numerous bands, artists and speakers, all from Jakarta, Bandung, Bekasi, Yogyakarta, and Tokyo, who freely talk about their own definitions and approaches to noise music.
